prestazioni: Supercharger upgrade to a Harrop HTV 2650 TVS supercharger kit (engine code: AJ-V8 Gen III 5.0L SC) with a custom 3.5-inch pulley, increasing boost to 12 psi (stock ~7-9 psi) and requiring a supporting fuel system with Injector Dynamics ID1300x injectors, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for precise calibration and knock control

Full exhaust system replacement with a Milltek Sport non-resonated 3.5-inch turbo-back system featuring 304 stainless steel mandrel-bent piping, quad 4.5-inch titanium tips, and a custom X-pipe crossover for optimized scavenging, reducing backpressure by 40% while maintaining SVR-specific V8 acoustics

Suspension overhaul with KW Automotive Clubsport coilovers (3-way adjustable damping, 80mm of height adjustability) paired with Eibach Pro-Series anti-roll bars (28mm front, 25mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) to eliminate chassis flex, complemented by a custom geometry alignment for -2.5° front camber and 1.8° rear toe-out for aggressive turn-in
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using the Overfinch 570SVR kit (OEM+ fitment, 50mm wider front fenders, 60mm rear) with integrated carbon fiber side skirts, front splitter, and rear diffuser, all finished in matte clear coat with exposed weave for weight reduction (~18kg savings) and aggressive stance

Custom front grille replacement with a 3D-printed titanium mesh insert (0.8mm gauge, 3mm aperture) by Titan Motorsports, retaining the SVR badge but replacing the stock honeycomb for improved airflow to the intercooler while maintaining OEM aesthetics, paired with a carbon fiber hood featuring dual heat extractors (Roush-style) for thermal management

Wheel setup with Rotiform LAS-R 20x11 ET35 (front) and 20x12 ET40 (rear) forged 3-piece wheels in a satin black finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35 R20 front, 325/30 R20 rear) with custom offset machining to clear the upgraded Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (390mm front, 380mm rear) and AP Racing brake ducts for cooling
